baseline: Corrected mockups on Chatbox shell (Phase 2.5 rebuild)

screens.notes: Same as CP-2 baseline. No new frontend changes in CP-3. Chatbox shell intact, safety banner visible, app card still renders as link (SHR-145 deferred).
Chess board renders correctly with pieces, move indicator (yellow square), status bar ('White to move'). Clean layout centered on page. Drag-and-drop and resign button added in CP-3.
41 endpoints listed. All CP-3 routes present: apps/register, submit-review, review-results, instances/suspend/resume/terminate, admin endpoints, consent, whisper, classrooms. OAS 3.0 spec.
